summary: Completed comprehensive testing of StackPilot Deployment & Docs Copilot. Backend APIs functional, frontend UI working correctly, AI integration operational but slow for complex repositories.

performance_concerns.issue: AI analysis takes 60+ seconds for complex repositories like React
performance_concerns.impact: May cause frontend timeouts, user experience concerns

integration_issues.issue: Long AI analysis time may cause user confusion - no intermediate feedback

passed_tests: Home page loads with dark theme by default
Input Project form - all fields functional
Source Type tabs (GitHub URL, Upload ZIP, Text Only) work
Basic CRUD operations on projects work
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider adding intermediate progress updates during AI analysis to improve user experience for long-running operations. All core functionality is working correctly.

success_percentage.backend: 90% - All APIs work, AI integration functional but slow
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All UI elements and interactions work correctly
success_percentage.integration: 85% - Works but AI operations are slow for complex repos
